column1: # CLI tools — single source of truth. TAB-separated: binary <TAB> macos <TAB> debian <TAB> notes
# Method tokens:  brew:<formula>  cask:<name>  apt:<pkg>  cargo:<crate>
# The "binary" column is the command you type (used for the `command -v` idempotency check).
# install/install-tools.sh reads this; brew/cask/apt/cargo are auto-installed, script/manual are printed.

column4: via Linuxbrew; apt alt: cli.github.com repo
or via nvm; Debian binary is `node` (pkg nodejs)
macOS ships unzip; Debian needs the package
cat with syntax highlight; Debian binary is `batcat` (aliased to bat in os/linux.sh)
Debian: host provides it (cloud-init installs docker-ce); skip here
shell function (not a PATH binary); via Linuxbrew, set NVM_DIR
via Linuxbrew; apt alt: hetznercloud/cli release binary
Linux `sed` is already GNU; macOS gets `gsed`
Linux has `timeout`; macOS gets `gtimeout` (used by sync.sh)
